title: OptimismPortal opi-007 l2Sender Invariant Memo v1
conclusion: No vulnerability claim. The source and upstream tests show a deliberate l2Sender reentrancy guard and reset pattern. The valuable next local task is explicit post-state assertion coverage across success, failed target, estimation revert, insufficient gas, nested call, and external-proof finalization paths.
next_action: Create a local fixture design packet or patch plan for l2Sender postcondition assertions before any proof execution.
